name: Concordia Financial Group, Ltd.
summary: Concordia Financial Group, Ltd., through its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services to small and medium-sized businesses and individuals. It offers various deposit and loan products. The company also provides securities, leasing, survey research and other information, venture capital, and other financial services. It operates through a network of branches, sub-branches, ATMs, and representative offices in Japan and internationally. Concordia Financial Group, Ltd. was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
